notes:
Added:
- Download Video: 'Prefer H.264' toggle (on by default) that prioritizes the
  H.264/AVC video track for maximum compatibility; falls back to best-available
  codec when the source has no H.264, so a download never fails.

Changed:
- Reorganized the Download Video tool layout: the Video Source and Output &
  Options cards now sit side by side at a 7:5 ratio with equal height and
  aligned bottom edges; the YouTube-cookies panel is nested inside the Source
  card; options are laid out compactly with the Download/Stop actions pinned to
  the card bottom.

Fixed:
- Quality dropdown in the Download Video tool was rendering behind the cookies
  panel (z-index/stacking-context bug); it now opens above surrounding cards.
